> Hacker, builder, pixel-pusher.  
> I write C++ tools, grow retro aesthetics, and ship GPL-licensed code.  
> Everything you see here was generated by tools living in this repo.

     alt="spratgen"
     width="96"><br>

**[spratgen](https://github.com/GnuJason/spratgen)**  
Pixel-art sprite generator core library (C++20, GPL)

</td>
<td align="center" width="220">

<!-- spratforge icon (jab animation GIF) -->
<img src="https://github.com/GnuJason/GnuJason/raw/main/assets/icons/spratforge_jab.gif"
     alt="spratforge"
     width="96"><br>

**[spratforge](https://github.com/GnuJason/GnuJason/tree/main/spratforge)**  
CLI pixel-art forge: palette enforcement, dithering, animation (C++20, GPL)

</td>
<td align="center" width="220">

<!-- RingQueen icon -->
<img src="https://github.com/GnuJason/GnuJason/raw/main/assets/icons/ringqueen_icon.png"
     alt="RingQueen"
     width="96"><br>

**[RingQueen](https://github.com/GnuJason/RingQueen)**  
Boxing-game engine with retro pixel-art renderer

</td>
</tr>
